title: PCR Prep from cDNA for IVT Reactions
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"6oeu3","text":"This protocol describes PCR1 and PCR2 reactions beginning with cDNA to generate transcript templates ready for IVT reaction.  This protocol is written for 192 (2x96) reactions but can also be used for fewer or more reactions by adjusting the amount of materials and equipment appropriately.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"d4n6o","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"14me0","text":"Note: Research reported in this publication was supported by the National Institute Of Mental Health of the National Institutes of Health under Award Number U19MH114830.
